description: F77 bad fixture (#386, R2-extended) — synced settings.json carrying operator-PII paths inside permissions.allow AND permissions.deny tool-call matchers. EVERY token is SYNTHETIC: '/Users/fakeuser' and '/home/fakebuilder' are INVENTED placeholders. The scanner MUST flag every <Tool>(/Users|/home/...) matcher entry as settings-permission-absolute-path, REGARDLESS of which operator-stem appears (the matcher form itself is the structural defect — a synced permissions.* entry MUST be relative or $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR-rooted). R2 expansion: covers the deny[] axis (cc-architect C-2) AND the full 8-tool SHAPE: Edit|Write|Read|Bash|MultiEdit|Glob|Grep|NotebookEdit (cc-architect C-3 + reviewer R-3).
